title: Daman Authority for Advance Ruling Reconstituted: An Important Update
content:
# Daman Authority for Advance Ruling Reconstituted: An Important Update

Ek important update hai. Government ne Daman Authority for Advance Ruling (AAR) ke reconstitution ke liye ek notification announce kiya hai.

Here are the key details:

*   **What:** The Central Government has reconstituted the Authority for Advance Ruling for Daman.
*   **Why:** This reconstitution is an amendment to update the designated officer in the Authority.
*   **Specific Change:** Notification No. 14/2018-Union territory Tax, dated October 8, 2018, has been amended. At Serial Numbers 3 and 4, in column (3), the entry for item (i) has been substituted. The new designated officer is now **Ms. Krati Nigam, Joint Commissioner, Central Goods and Services Tax (CGST), Daman**.
*   **Notification Details:** This change has been brought through Notification No. 01/2026 – Union territory Tax, dated March 6, 2026.
*   **Effective Date:** This amendment shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://egazette.nic.in/WriteReadData/2026/270743.pdf)

*Published on: 8 March 2026*
